creator: nerull@nothingnet.com
text:
Hello,
	I was just researching my troubles with getting TightVNC to work on 
my FreeBSD 6.2 AMD64 machine and saw this bug report. If you need an 
AMD64 machine for runtime testing I'll be happy to provide you with 
access to mine as I would love to see VNC working "out of the box" on 
64-bit FreeBSD. Also, if anyone's interested in a workaround I have a 
.tbz package containing the 32-bit TightVNC and it's needed libs 
which can be used until the 64-bit version is working properly.
